name: Quantum Workplace
description: Empower managers with tools to grow, develop, and align teams, driving employee impact and peak performance. Learn more about Quantum Workplace

reviews.review_description: Quantum Workplace has made it easy to not only gather data scientifically, but has also made it simple to see the data and see trends. The experts at Quantum have done a great job presenting and helping when we need to dig in deeper. Quantum Workplace has made our roles in HR easier.
reviews.review_pros: Quantum Workplace has made sense, through analytics, what is happening with our workforce.
reviews.review_cons: Nothing I think the experience is great.

reviews.review_title: We are big fans of QW
reviews.review_description: I cannot talk highly enough about everyone I've worked with at QW. Everyone is responsive, patient and positive. I truly appreciate the work they have done.
reviews.review_pros: I love that everything is in one place, we currently have four features and look forward to adding more. I also appreciate the data analytics and AI feature especially for the engagement results.
reviews.review_cons: I'd like for it to have LMS integrations. We use cornerstone and it would be helpful to connect both systems.

reviews.review_pros: It has a very management friendly vibe, I see how middle managers might enjoy it as it allows them to track and be notified about peoples entries
reviews.review_cons: It feels the software fills an artificial need, where middle managers feel they must monitor constantly peoples goals and performance especially in roles where those are very hard to quantify.

reviews.review_description: Complete and thorough customer support from discovery through launch into analysis of survey results.
reviews.review_pros: Quantum provides excellent customer support. Their application interface is nicely laid out and easy to use.
reviews.review_cons: I really have no complaints. My only suggestion would be making it easier to access the library of survey questions. They are a little buried and it requires a few too many clicks to find them.

reviews.review_title: Jury is still out on this transition.
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: So far it has been a good experience. I think that once we are using the system more and I really know the ins and outs I will be able to say more definitively if this is a product we will stay with long term. Right now, I am unsure.
reviews.review_pros: I like that they were able to transfer my data from my old software. Getting the system up and running was relatively smooth.
reviews.review_cons: There are some features that I wish functioned a little differently, such as more filtering categories and dashboard quick-view items. I have sent recommendations to my implementation specialist Kylen.

reviews.review_description: My overall experience with Quantum Workplace has been positive. It is a user-friendly tool that supports both employees and managers effectively. The platform offers useful features such as customizable surveys, which leadership can leverage to gain valuable insights into employee sentiment.
reviews.review_pros: Quantum Workplace is highly user-friendly and offers customizable features to effectively engage employees.
reviews.review_cons: Quantum Workplace is highly user-friendly and offers customizable features to support employee engagement. However, it lacks certain engagement tools found in other platforms—such as a points-based rewards system that allows employees to accumulate and redeem points for recognition or incentives.

reviews.review_description: My overall experience with it has been good. What I have not understood, I'm able to have help with via my team reps, they are the ones who make all the difference in using the tool. [sensitive content hidden] are amazing!
reviews.review_pros: There great employee engagement tools like feedback, pulse and lifecycle surveys to measure engagement. Flexibility in templates and survey options, love the AI assist function.
reviews.review_cons: There is a bit of a learning curve for understanding the analytics side, user friendly interface could be better or more simplified to gain employee usage and engagement

reviews.review_title: Great Decision Moving to Quantum Workplace
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: It has been a great experience. The technology is comprehensive and easy to sue and support is great.
reviews.review_pros: The client support team is outstanding. I love the way I can slide and dice data. The output from our Engagement survey allowed us to create actions plans that are achievable
reviews.review_cons: That we have to use Feedback instead of Surveys to obtain New Hire Manager data. I wish we could the Survey format and align data between the manager and employee feedback at 1 week, 30/60/90 days 6 & 12 months

reviews.review_description: Overall, the experience was superb. Implementation was super easy and straight forward. The assigned Insight Analysts, [sensitive content hidden], and Senior Implementation Specialist, [sensitive content hidden] were great!
reviews.review_pros: Overall, the system the support, and overall experience is one big pro. I would recommend Quantum to others.
reviews.review_cons: Not any big cons. There was a slight mishap in the beginning from our sales rep. I felt like he gave us incorrect communication as a way to solidify a sale for him. I didn't like that there didn't seem like any corrective action or additional incentive for us to offset that experience.

reviews.review_title: Solid Platform and Customer Service and Training
reviews.review_description: Very Good - The survey tool works well and the reports are made easy. The Action Plan feature and suggestions for action planning. The team members are professional and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_pros: We like the questions and survey link to local Best Places to Work. We also like how the platform performs.
reviews.review_cons: Turning to AI to help with employee words in responses on surveys. We want to hear employee's words, not AI's interpretation.

reviews.review_description: it's ok, we used to use paylocity performance module and it was easier for review forms/etc. the recognition function within quantum is good though.
reviews.review_pros: nice visual interface - some parts are very easy to use from user standpoint, but the reviews from admin setup aren't as simple.
reviews.review_cons: admin setup and understanding how things are cascaded down are not easily understood. should also be ability to put comments in about individuals that are shared w/ manager, but not necessarily public to employee (outside of private notes).

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Great! Wish there was more help with exact feedback from the survey but I think that comes with the upgrade to insights so that is on us for not having but wish we knew before hand.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use, only a few weird work arounds but got used to them and the process flows very smoothly.
reviews.review_cons: A lot of information which is good but overwhelming for the first time. Wish we had more time to slow down and go through the results more.

reviews.review_description: Overall Quantum is a great product and I see why so many companies use it for internal employee engagement, as it is a pretty robust system and useful in many ways.
reviews.review_pros: Adding employee info is very simple, the Recognition feature has boosted morale, and the 1-on-1/Employee Review feature helps us keep track of employee productivity throughout the year.
reviews.review_cons: Creating surveys is not very user friendly. I think renaming some of the settings could people create the survey they want. I find myself either not being able to see any of the survey results or everyone is able to see everyone else's survey results.

reviews.review_title: Measuring Engagement in the Modern Workforce
reviews.review_description: Overall experience with Quantum Workplace has checked every box I have looked for in a survey platform. The value that comes along with the lack of a learning curve for the usage make it a tools worth having in your toolbelt.
reviews.review_pros: User gets their personal report back while management recieves a collective report for overall average statistics of the percentage of individuals who participate. Ease of use for employees, without the need to login. Provides different question types for the ability for employees to manage their answers.
reviews.review_cons: The ability of viewing the overall participation rate of all individuals the review link has been submitted to is not a negative, but the negative falls in the lack of ability for management to see which individual employees haven’t participated in the survey. The ability to see if they have participated and completed the survey would removes this from the negative.

reviews.review_title: Love the tool! Use it and value your people!
reviews.review_description: My experience has been great as a supervisor. I wished my leaders would use it more consistently. But it is growing!
reviews.review_pros: Great way to track my goals and my employees goals! I appreciated the support of Quantum Workplace. The analytics are awesome!
reviews.review_cons: I wished as an organization we started with simple goal setting. So we adapted to using it more consistently.

reviews.review_title: Great for individual, but lacking for team management.
reviews.review_description: In general, I have positive interactions with the tool. I think it has the potential to be a one-stop shop, but it needs some tweaking and personalization to our organization to meet the requirements that we have and need to be met.
reviews.review_pros: I like the individual usability of the tool in keeping goals in front of me and allowing me to accurately record what is happening when.
reviews.review_cons: I think the administrative features are too limiting. I want to empower my team leaders to have access to manage the administration of their teams on their own, but due to the limitations and visibility of the material, I cannot give it down the organization. Too limiting.

reviews.review_description: The representatives were very helpful with setting up surveys. The prebuilt surveys are easy to customize and distribute. Again the performance piece was lacking what our organization needed which was something more performance driven.
reviews.review_pros: It's easy to navigate as an administrative user and as an employee.
reviews.review_cons: The performance module used KPI or SMART goals. We were looking for a more basic performance review with a development plan.

reviews.review_description: Excellent! When I send a request for help, I typically get a response within two hours.
reviews.review_pros: Responsiveness of support and benchmarks.
reviews.review_cons: It took a while to learn what I could and could not do with the survey tool and in the beginning the help I received was a link to an article which I did not like. Later, I learned that I could talk to a human to get the help I needed.

reviews.review_description: Quantum has allowed my to view and analyze the results for my employee engagement surveys with ease.
reviews.review_pros: Survey results at your fingertips with applicable benchmarks.
reviews.review_cons: Less than full concierge service to analyze results.

reviews.review_description: Quantum is a very valuable tool and is great way to keep the employees informed of their progress and goals.
reviews.review_pros: I like the ability to provide recognition from team member to team member
reviews.review_cons: Running report is not very user friendly

reviews.review_description: Everyone has been wonderful from the start up till now especially the love the chat feature where we can interact with live help desk folks.
reviews.review_pros: Very easy to use. We are using the Survey, 1:1's and Talent Review options. All have been great products and so helpful to our management team.
reviews.review_cons: I think you need to add another 20 hours to training for when the new customers actually go to use the product the first few times especially when more than one module is being used.

reviews.review_description: Working with Quantum Workplace has been an exceptional experience. What I value most is the personalized support from the team. They’ve consistently gone above and beyond to understand our needs, providing timely guidance and solutions that have made a real impact on our engagement survey process. Their tools are powerful, but it’s the team that truly stands out. They’re proactive, responsive, and genuinely invested in our success. I’m excited to continue working with them on our new hire and exit surveys, knowing we’re in great hands. If you want a partner who cares about your success, I highly recommend Quantum Workplace!
reviews.review_pros: What I love most about Quantum Workplace is their exceptional team and the personal touch they bring to everything. I'm not sure if I'm able to share names on this review, but the team have been amazing throughout the entire engagement survey process. They understand our needs and provide timely, thoughtful support every step of the way. Quantum's platform is user-friendly and powerful, but it’s the team's commitment to our success that really stands out. They’re more than just a vendor—they’re a true partner invested in helping us grow. Highly recommend Quantum Workplace for anyone looking for a supportive and reliable partner!
reviews.review_cons: The team's support has always been quick to assist, making the process of learning all the new tools much easier. It's hard to find something that's not to like about Quantum Workplace and their amazing team!

reviews.review_description: The system is overall is very easy to use. As a supervisor the ability to have dedicated spaces to track 1:1 meetings with your employees is handy. From an organization the area we use to recognize employees is great! It's like a giant team chat where messages, gifs, photos and such can be shared and you can call out a great job to another employee.
reviews.review_pros: The ease of use, the functioning when it comes to data and ability to sort through information and filter is helpful.
reviews.review_cons: Nothing really that I dislike about it really.

reviews.review_description: My experience is that employees feel comfortable completing the survey and providing feedback.
reviews.review_pros: I like that Quantum Workplace is known for data security and anonymity. Brand reputation and quality products are important, and I see Quantum as one of those products.
reviews.review_cons: The way surveys are sent and options to resend - regarding optics - can be a bit clunky.

reviews.review_pros: The ease of navigating the system. I really enjoy the AI and prompts the system gives for conversation starters, as well as where each team should focus their attention.
reviews.review_cons: At times, splicing the data can be challenging as it does not seem easy to do more than 1 filter at a time.
